name: BUBBLE BLAST
description: Bubble Blast is a fun and fast-paced arcade game where players pop bubbles to score points. Different bubbles appear on the screen, and you must react quickly to burst them before they disappear. The more bubbles you pop, the higher your score. But be careful—missing too many bubbles or reacting too slowly can cost you points! How many bubbles can you blast?
instructions: Controls Mouse Click Tap ndash Pop the bubbles React quickly before bubbles disappear
